ai_summary: GE Power India Limited announced significant leadership changes, including the re-appointment of an Independent Director and the appointment of new Company Secretary, Chief Financial Officer (CFO), and a Whole-Time Director, all effective mid-2026. These strategic appointments, featuring internal promotions for the CFO and Whole-Time Director, are poised to enhance the company's corporate governance, financial oversight, and operational leadership capabilities. No material red flags are apparent in these management and board restructurings, which appear to strengthen the executive team.
